name: io.github.chrischall/untappd-mcp
description: Untappd MCP — search beers/breweries/venues, read check-ins & wishlists, post check-ins

environmentVariables.name: UNTAPPD_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: Your Untappd username or login email.

environmentVariables.name: UNTAPPD_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Your Untappd account password (used only for xauth login).

environmentVariables.name: UNTAPPD_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Untappd mobile app client id (obtained by intercepting the app; see README).
